featured.name: Aurora Performance Jacket
featured.shortDescription: Lightweight shell with breathable panels for training in cool weather.

featured.name: Zen Flow Runner
featured.shortDescription: Responsive cushioning and recycled upper for daily miles.

products.name: Aurora Performance Jacket
products.shortDescription: Lightweight shell with breathable panels for training in cool weather.
products.description: The Aurora Performance Jacket combines wind-resistant ripstop with laser-cut ventilation. Ideal for early-morning runs and post-workout layers. Machine washable; ships carbon-neutral.

products.name: Zen Flow Runner
products.shortDescription: Responsive cushioning and recycled upper for daily miles.
products.description: Zen Flow Runner uses a dual-density midsole and wide toe box. The recycled mesh upper reduces weight while maintaining structure for 500+ mile durability tests.

products.name: Hydra Insulated Bottle
products.shortDescription: 24h cold retention, BPA-free, fits standard bottle cages.
products.description: Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Powder-coated exterior resists scratches; leak-proof flip lid included.

products.name: Grounded Yoga Mat
products.shortDescription: Extra grip, 5mm natural rubber, alignment markers.
products.description: Natural rubber base with microfiber top layer for sweat-heavy sessions. Alignment markers help posture without looking cluttered.

testimonials.author: Sara M.
testimonials.quote: This demo made our team finally understand why SSR matters for product pages.

testimonials.author: Omar K.
testimonials.quote: Seeing JSON-LD in View Source convinced us to adopt structured data site-wide.
